title: noronhia oblanceolata
intro:
Noronhia oblanceolata is a species of flowering plant in the family Ochnaceae, commonly known as a tree or shrub native to Madagascar.

Noronhia oblanceolata is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing relief from digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Noronhia oblanceolata include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
